headline: Protein Structure Prediction: AlphaFold, RoseTTAFold, and AI-Driven Structural Biology
description: Protein structure prediction has been transformed by AI — from AlphaFold2's historic 2020 breakthrough predicting static 3D structures to current frontiers: simulating protein dynamics, predicting multi-protein complexes, and designing entirely new proteins with specified functions. The 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry recognized this revolution, but fundamental challenges remain.

citation.name: The latest AI breakthroughs in structural biology: protein conformational landscapes and de novo design
Artificial intelligence methods for protein folding and design
